title: In Virginia, the world's data center capital faces mounting opposition from local residents
subhead: This East Coast US state is home to 12% of the world's capacity for the massive data centers essential to AI, which it has attracted largely through tax breaks. Local residents are especially concerned about their environmental impact.

title: In Hungary, jubilation marks Péter Magyar's inauguration as prime minister
39 in custody in Paris over banned far-right and anti-fascist marches
Spanish island braces for arrival of Hantavirus cruise ship
subhead: The MV Hondius, hit by a hantavirus outbreak, is set to anchor off Tenerife, in the Canary Islands, on Sunday. About 80 passengers will be evacuated by Zodiac boats and immediately repatriated by plane. The operation is being overseen by the World Health Organization's director general.

title: Mali: Dozens killed in fresh attacks, say local and security sources
subhead: One official said the latest attacks by armed factions like the Al-Qaeda-linked Group for the Support of Islam and Muslims had brought the death toll to over 70 in recent days.

title: Is it really possible to tax oil companies' windfall profits?
subhead: As fuel prices soar, the idea of taxing multinational oil companies' windfall profits has resurfaced. Yet there's heated debate over whether such a tax is actually possible.

title: A race to photograph vanishing cinemas
subhead: A Swiss cinematographer and filmmaker has traveled the world to document old cinemas and preserve the memory of endangered heritage and striking architecture. Simon Edelstein's latest book focuses on India.

Pedro Almodóvar still burns with desire for cinema
subhead: Born during Madrid's cultural awakening, his work is celebrated around the world. But, despite several appearances at the Cannes Film Festival, Pedro Almodóvar has never won the Palme d'Or. Now 76 years old, the pioneer of Spanish auteur cinema is back in competition with 'Bitter Christmas,' in which he delves into the labyrinth of creation.

title: Leo XIV's return to realism and formalism at the Vatican
subhead: One year after his election as head of the Catholic Church, Pope Leo, Francis's successor, stands out from the Argentine pontiff in his approach, yet maintains a through line on substance.

title: Six star Japanese products for umami recipes
subhead: These emblematic ingredients of Japanese cuisine are on the menu in these six French-Japanese recipes, accompanied by tips on how to use them easily on a daily basis.
